claim: Sam Altman signals GPT-6 will focus on deeper model memory; memory is being positioned as a competitive moat and efficiency multiplier for personalized responses.
actionable: Expect future models to have persistent memory capabilities; design workflows that take advantage of models learning your preferences over time; start building memory infrastructure now.
source_title: AI News: Deepseek Update, GPT-6, Qwen-Image, Qwen-2, Meta Restructure, New Robots, and more!

claim: DeepSeek V3.1 is open weights and available; requires significant VRAM; quantized versions should come soon for smaller hardware.
actionable: For open-source model experiments, watch for quantized DeepSeek V3.1 releases; test on your hardware before committing to training/finetuning.
source_title: AI News: Deepseek Update, GPT-6, Qwen-Image, Qwen-2, Meta Restructure, New Robots, and more!

claim: Qwen-Image-Edit (open source) shows state-of-the-art image editing: precise text replacement, object manipulation, semantic understanding; bilingual and style-aware.
actionable: For image editing tasks, benchmark Qwen-Image-Edit against proprietary tools; it's open source and competitive; test on your specific use cases.
source_title: AI News: Deepseek Update, GPT-6, Qwen-Image, Qwen-2, Meta Restructure, New Robots, and more!

claim: agents.md is a new standard for AI coding prompts across tools (Cursor, Windsurf, Claude Code, etc.); consolidates tool-specific instructions into one predictable file.
actionable: Create an agents.md file in your projects following the standard; use the same file across multiple AI coding tools instead of tool-specific prompt files.
source_title: AI News: Deepseek Update, GPT-6, Qwen-Image, Qwen-2, Meta Restructure, New Robots, and more!

claim: GPT-5 is solving new mathematics: proved a better bound in convex optimization than what was in a published paper; proof verified as correct.
actionable: Recognize that frontier models are now solving novel research problems; consider using them for research-level tasks, but verify proofs carefully.
source_title: AI News: Deepseek Update, GPT-6, Qwen-Image, Qwen-2, Meta Restructure, New Robots, and more!

claim: Boston Dynamics Atlas (humanoid robot) is now fully autonomous; performs long-horizon language-conditioned tasks (open box, grab items, adapt to obstacles) trained end-to-end.
actionable: Monitor humanoid robot progress as a proxy for embodied AI progress; expect integration with vision-language models and agent frameworks within 1-2 years.
source_title: AI News: Deepseek Update, GPT-6, Qwen-Image, Qwen-2, Meta Restructure, New Robots, and more!

claim: Perplexity is rolling out SuperMemory feature to all users; early tests show it outperforms existing memory implementations; helps personalize search/research.
actionable: Expect memory-augmented search and research tools to become standard; design workflows that assume AI assistants will remember your preferences over time.
